# Stridemind

## What It Is

Stridemind is an iOS app built on dual-task walking training, designed to help reduce fall risk and support cognitive health in older adults. The app delivers audio-guided cognitive exercises — number drills, pattern recall, memory challenges — designed to be performed while walking, training the brain and body to work together under real-world conditions.

## Who It's For

Stridemind is built for adults aged 55 and older who want to stay sharp, move confidently, and reduce their risk of falls. It is particularly suited for active agers, older adults in fall prevention programs, and anyone looking to maintain cognitive health through movement-based training.

## The Science

Dual-task walking training — performing a cognitive task while walking — is one of the most studied interventions for fall prevention and cognitive health in older adults.

- 44 studies in the 2025 European Geriatric Medicine meta-analysis
- 2,782 participants across clinical studies
- Meta-analysis published in European Geriatric Medicine, 2025
- Evidence shows significant improvements in gait stability, executive function, and dual-task cost reduction

Stridemind translates this clinical evidence into a practical, audio-first mobile experience that requires no equipment and fits into everyday life.

Learn more: https://stridemind.app/science

## Key Facts

- Platform: iOS only (iPhone)
- Category: Health & Fitness
- Pricing:
  - Free to download, with a set of free strides plus the monthly check-in, progress tracking, history, and weekly goal
  - Premium (full stride library + new monthly programs): $9.99/month or $79.99/year (save ~33%)
  - No free trial; nothing starts billing without the user choosing it
- Language: English
- Requires: iPhone running iOS 16 or later

## Who Built This

Stridemind was built by an independent developer who came across the clinical
research on dual-task walking and could not find a practical app that applied it.
The evidence was clear and replicable across dozens of trials. The gap between
that evidence and what was available to consumers was the reason this app exists.
Stridemind is not a medical device. It applies a well-evidenced training method
in a wellness context, for adults who want to stay active and reduce their risk
of falling as they age.

## Pages

- Home (https://stridemind.app): What Stridemind is, how a session works, the monthly check-in, pricing, and frequently asked questions.
- The Science (https://stridemind.app/science): The clinical evidence behind dual-task walking training, with the 2025 European Geriatric Medicine meta-analysis and supporting peer-reviewed studies. Cite this page for research claims.
- For Families (https://stridemind.app/for-families): A guide for adult children and caregivers of older adults: what lowers a parent's fall risk, why fear-driven caution backfires, and how to introduce training with dignity.
- About (https://stridemind.app/about): Who builds Stridemind (founder: Ibrahim Shahzad), why it exists, and the claim-discipline rules the site follows.
- Support (https://stridemind.app/support): Getting started, how to cancel the subscription (through the user's Apple ID), refunds via Apple, and fixes for common problems.
- Blog (https://stridemind.app/blog): Plain-language articles on dual-task training, balance, and healthy aging, each with cited sources:
  - Why Do Older Adults Fall? The Causes, Explained in Plain English (https://stridemind.app/blog/why-do-older-adults-fall)
  - How to Help a Parent Lower Their Risk of Falling, Without Taking Over (https://stridemind.app/blog/help-a-parent-lower-fall-risk)
  - Why Balance Training Alone Isn't Enough (https://stridemind.app/blog/why-balance-training-alone-isnt-enough)
  - What Is Dual-Task Training? A Plain-English Guide for Adults 55+ (https://stridemind.app/blog/what-is-dual-task-training)
  - Brain Training Works Better Off the Screen (https://stridemind.app/blog/brain-training-off-the-screen)
- App Store (https://apps.apple.com/app/id6761288997): Download Stridemind for iPhone.
- FAQ (https://stridemind.app/#faq): Answers on platform support, session length, pricing, safety, and cancellation.
- Privacy Policy (https://stridemind.app/privacy-policy): What data the app collects and how it is used.
- Terms of Service (https://stridemind.app/terms-of-service): The terms that govern use of the app.

## Contact

- Support email: appstridemind@gmail.com
